channel.title: BrowBro
channel.description: In-app update feed for BrowBro. Each item is EdDSA-signed; see docs/UPDATES.md.

item.title: Version 0.1.4
item.description:
Added

  • In-app updates. BrowBro now updates itself (via Sparkle), so DMG and Homebrew installs no longer need a manual re-download. Settings → Updates has a Check Now button and an Automatically check for updates toggle, and the menu-bar dropdown gains a Check for Updates… item. Updates are verified with an EdDSA signature and installed in place — and, unlike a manual download, they skip the first-run "Open Anyway" prompt. See docs/UPDATES.md.
  • A version indicator in Settings: the current version and build show at the bottom of the window ("BrowBro 0.1.4 (4)").
